name: Sweetbread Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken stock or stock from cooking the sweetbreads
1 can (8 ounces) sliced mushrooms, and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the flour and mix carefully.
3. Slowly pour in the stock, adding the water chestnuts, parsley, mushrooms, and seasonings.
4. When the sauce has thickened, beat together the eggs and cream.
5. Pour the sauce into the egg mixture and return to the double boiler.
6. Stir constantly until thick, then mix in the sweetbreads.
7. Pour into a buttered casserole.
8. Mix the breadcrumbs and cheese and sprinkle over the casserole.
9. Bake in a 275°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes.
To Prepare Sweetbreads:
1. Soak in cold water for 25 to 30 minutes.
2. Remove the membranes and simmer in water for 15 minutes, adding 2 thin slices of lemon and 1 teaspoon of salt per quart of water.
3. Cool and use in any recipe calling for sweetbreads. These precooked sweetbreads may be prepared in quantity and frozen.
